hin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Hindi.
hip: noun. The outward-projecting parts of the pelvis and top of the femur and the overlying tissue.
hipping: verb. present participle and gerund of hip
ins: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Indian Sign Language.
nighs: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of nigh
nip: verb. To catch and enclose or compress tightly between two surfaces, or points which are brought together or closed; to pinch; to close in
pig: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Pisabo.
piing: verb. present participle and gerund of pi
pin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Piame.
ping: noun. A high-pitched, short and somewhat sharp sound.
pip: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Pero.
piping: verb. present participle and gerund of pipe
pis: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Pijin.
pishing: verb. present participle and gerund of pish
psi: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeast Pashayi.
shin: noun. The front part of the leg below the knee; the front edge of the shin bone: Shinbone on Wikipedia.
ship: noun. A water - borne vessel generally larger than a boat.
sigh: verb. To inhale a larger quantity of air than usual, and immediately expel it; to make a deep single audible respiration, especially as the
sign: noun. A visible fact that shows that something exists or may happen.
sip: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Sikkimese.
siping: verb. present participle and gerund of sipe
sipping: noun. The act of taking a sip.
snip: verb. To cut with short sharp actions, as with scissors.
spin: verb. To rotate, revolve, gyrate (usually quickly); to partially or completely rotate to face another direction.
